description_long: This adult male pedestrian is depicted with a modern urban style, featuring a short-sleeved, horizontally striped shirt with a bold graphic design on the back. He has a full beard and his hair is styled in a high, short ponytail. His arms are tattooed, and he wears a gold chain necklace, adding to his streetwear aesthetic. He is dressed in cropped cargo pants with side pockets and fitted at the calves, paired with low-top sneakers. The overall appearance suggests a confident, fashion-forward individual likely to be seen in contemporary city environments.
description: A fashionably dressed adult male with a striped shirt, graphic back, tattoos, and a ponytail, wearing cargo pants and sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped shirt, beard, necklace, tattoos, and relaxed stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ponytail, profile of the face, and arm tattoos.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bold graphic design on the shirt's back and the cropped cargo pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ponytail, facial profile, and tattooed arm.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt with graphic back, cropped cargo pants, and a gold chain necklace
attribute_hairstyle: short hair styled in a high ponytail
